creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lippe
Date: Thu Feb 14 22:25:27 2013
New Revision: 312247
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312247

Log:
  - Update to 6.8
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/176119
  Submitted by:	Danilo Egea Gondolfo <danilogondolfo@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/devel/ragel/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/ragel/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/ragel/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/ragel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ragel/Makefile	Thu Feb 14 22:09:48 2013	(r312246)
+++ head/devel/ragel/Makefile	Thu Feb 14 22:25:27 2013	(r312247)
@@ -1,17 +1,12 @@
-# ex:ts=8
-# Ports collection makefile for:	ragel
-# Date created:			Mar 6, 2002
-# Whom:				ijliao
-#
+# Created by: ijliao
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	ragel
-PORTVERSION=	6.7
+PORTVERSION=	6.8
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.complang.org/ragel/
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	danilogondolfo@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Compile regular languages into executable C/C++ code
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2 GPLv3
@@ -22,28 +17,34 @@ GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
 MAN1=		${PORTNAME}.1
-PORTDOCS=	*
-PORTEXAMPLES=	*
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/${PORTNAME}
-
-post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|^CXXFLAGS=|#CXXFLAGS=|g' ${WRKSRC}/configure
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} '/[:.]c/!s/compare/this->&/' \
-		${WRKSRC}/aapl/avlcommon.h \
-		${WRKSRC}/aapl/bstcommon.h \
-		${WRKSRC}/aapl/bubblesort.h \
-		${WRKSRC}/aapl/mergesort.h
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's/setiosflags/std::&/' \
-		${WRKSRC}/ragel/javacodegen.cpp
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS EXAMPLES
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-manual
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	fig2dev:${PORTSDIR}/print/transfig
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	pdflatex:${PORTSDIR}/print/teTeX
+PLIST_SUB+=	DOCS=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=	DOCS="@comment "
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
+PLIST_SUB+=	EXAMPLES=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=	EXAMPLES="@comment "
+.endif
 
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/ragel/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/${PORTNAME}.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/*.pdf ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
-.if !defined(NOPORTEXAMPLES)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
 	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/test; ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${EXAMPLESDIR})
 .endif

Modified: head/devel/ragel/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ragel/distinfo	Thu Feb 14 22:09:48 2013	(r312246)
+++ head/devel/ragel/distinfo	Thu Feb 14 22:25:27 2013	(r312247)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ragel-6.7.tar.gz) = 46df8e3f117a730f8896061c95ea8e8f53e9789cb053c2eea047833724fd7a30
-SIZE (ragel-6.7.tar.gz) = 1182734
+SHA256 (ragel-6.8.tar.gz) = dd7f7d22f3a58147379bda61334d341c2caa0caf9f71897e3e4ec05c8f398764
+SIZE (ragel-6.8.tar.gz) = 1211146
